type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Increase in emissions between 2021 and 2022 due to an increase in power generation.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Increases in emissions between 2021 and 2022 were due to an increase in power generation. However, compared to the other Part 4 substances, the percent increase in CO emissions between 2021-2022 was lower, which is likely due to improved fuel burn efficiencies resulting from the electrical generating units running at higher loads in 2022.
